name: Dusty Potato Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine yeast with warm potato water and let foam.
2. Stir in sugar, salt, and 3 cups of flour. Beat well to develop gluten.
3. Stir in cooled melted shortening. Add remaining 2 1/2 to 3 cups of flour gradually.
4. Turn dough out on a floured surface and knead for 8 to 10 minutes.
5. Place the dough in a greased bowl, turning once to grease the top.
6. Cover and let rise until doubled in bulk, about 1 to 1 1/2 hours.
7. Knead dough down in the bowl.
8. Divide dough into two. Shape each into balls and place in well-greased rounded pans.
9. Cover and let rise until almost doubled, about 45 to 60 minutes.
10. Dust loaves lightly with flour before baking.
11. Makes 2 loaves.
12. Bake at 400 degrees F for 35 to 40 minutes. Cool on wire racks.
